compass_4pt._label: Compass Scores For Teacher (4pt — for state reporting)

professionalism.53f37f93ff8eb90200416a65: P.1 Partners with parents and/or colleagues through frequent communication and spirit of collaboration
professionalism.56abe1670c19210700d54011: P.4 Timeliness to school/office, duty, and meetings
professionalism.56abe1670c19210700d54019: P.5 Proactively and productively solves problems and has conversations that lead to improvements

values._note: PDF labels values as generic 'LV.1 Value 1' through 'LV.1 Value 6'. Actual FLS value names not in archive form text.
